{"code":"issues = linear.list_issues(state="in_progress")

# Count issues per assignee
from collections import Counter
counts = Counter(iss["assignee"] for iss in issues)

# Find the person with the most issues
top_person, top_count = counts.most_common(1)[0]
(f"{top_person} — {top_count} issues")"}
